# Hotel Siddhi Vinayak — Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

> Hotel Siddhi Vinayak is a comfortable, well-located budget-to-mid-range hotel in
> Jodhpur ("the Blue City"), Rajasthan, India. It offers clean air-conditioned
> rooms, an in-house vegetarian restaurant, free Wi-Fi, free parking and a 24x7
> front desk — about 350 m (a 5-minute walk) from Jodhpur Railway Station and a
> short drive from Mehrangarh Fort and the old city. Family-friendly and ideal for
> train travellers and tourists exploring Jodhpur.

## Key facts (entity: Hotel Siddhi Vinayak)
- Type: Hotel / LodgingBusiness (budget & family hotel)
- City: Jodhpur · Region: Rajasthan · Country: India
- Canonical website: https://hotelsiddhi-vinayak.com
- Address: MG Hospital Road, Medical Market, opposite M.G. Hospital, Jalori Gate, Rawaton Ka Bass, Jodhpur, Rajasthan 342001, India
- Geo: 26.2849, 73.0188
- Phone: +91 89528 02559
- WhatsApp: +91 89528 02559 (https://wa.me/918952802559)
- Email: hotelsiddhivinayakjodhpur@gmail.com
- Guest rating: 3.7 / 5 from 791+ Google reviews
- Check-in: 11:00 AM · Check-out: 11:00 AM · 24-hour front desk
- Policies: valid government photo ID required (PAN card not accepted); 100% advance payment at check-in; free cancellation up to 72 hours before check-in; no visitors in rooms; no outside food; non-smoking; foreign nationals need passport + visa. Full policies: https://hotelsiddhi-vinayak.com/hotel-policies
- Rates: dynamic / live — set in real time by the Stayflexi booking engine (vary by date, season and demand). No fixed published rate; check the booking engine or message us for the best available rate.

## How to book
- Direct online booking with real-time availability and instant confirmation:
  https://bookingengine.stayflexi.com/?hotel_id=29355 (Stayflexi booking engine, secure payment)
- Or book direct by Call / WhatsApp at +91 89528 02559 — best available rate, no booking fees, no OTA commission.
- Also listed on Booking.com, MakeMyTrip, Agoda, Expedia, Cleartrip, Tripadvisor, Goibibo and other major travel sites.

## Room categories (EP / room-only plan; live rates via the booking engine)
- Deluxe Room — 2 guests · 1 double bed · ~220 sq ft · budget-friendly. Rooms 202/204/205/207/208/210.
- Super Deluxe Room — 2–3 guests · 1 king bed + sitting area · ~300 sq ft · premium value. Rooms 301–305/307/308/309/310.
- Triple Deluxe Room — 3 guests · 1 double + 1 single bed · ~320 sq ft · ideal for three. Rooms 201/203/206/209.
- Family Four Bed Room — 4 guests · 2 double beds · ~450 sq ft · best for families. Room 306.
- All rooms: air conditioning, free Wi-Fi, LED/Smart TV, hot water, daily housekeeping, room service.

## Amenities
Free high-speed Wi-Fi · free on-site parking with EV charging · air conditioning ·
24x7 front desk · sun terrace · travel/tour desk · in-house vegetarian restaurant ·
room service · daily housekeeping · 24-hour hot water · airport/railway pickup (paid).

## Dining
In-house vegetarian (pure-veg) restaurant serving freshly cooked Indian meals, with
a rooftop terrace offering views toward Mehrangarh Fort. Room service available
through the day. Breakfast available on request.

## Location & nearby attractions (approx. distance from the hotel)
- Jodhpur Railway Station — ~350 m (5-minute walk)
- Jodhpur Airport — ~5 km
- Clock Tower & Sardar Market — ~3 km
- Toorji Ka Jhalra Stepwell — ~3 km
- Mehrangarh Fort — ~4 km (10–15-minute drive)
- Jaswant Thada — ~4.5 km
- Umaid Bhawan Palace — ~6 km
- Mandore Gardens — ~9 km

## Search relevance (what this hotel is good for)
Hotel in Jodhpur · budget hotel in Jodhpur · family hotel in Jodhpur · hotel near
Jodhpur Railway Station · hotel near Mehrangarh Fort and Jodhpur tourist attractions
· clean AC rooms · free parking · vegetarian restaurant · direct booking.

## Answers to common questions
- What is Hotel Siddhi Vinayak? A comfortable budget/family hotel in Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India, near the railway station and old city.
- Where is it located? Opposite M.G. Hospital, Jalori Gate, Jodhpur 342001 — ~350 m from Jodhpur Railway Station.
- What room types are available? Deluxe, Super Deluxe, Triple Deluxe and Family Four Bed rooms. Rates are dynamic — see today's live rate on the booking engine.
- Does it have a restaurant? Yes — an in-house pure-vegetarian restaurant plus 24x7 room service.
- How can guests book? Online (real-time) via the Stayflexi booking engine, or by Call/WhatsApp at +91 89528 02559 for the best direct rate.
- Contact? Phone/WhatsApp +91 89528 02559, email hotelsiddhivinayakjodhpur@gmail.com.
- Is parking/Wi-Fi free? Yes — free on-site parking (with EV charging) and free high-speed Wi-Fi.
- Check-in / check-out? Check-in from 11:00 AM, check-out by 11:00 AM; early check-in 9:00 AM–12:00 noon complimentary (subject to availability).

## Best time to visit Jodhpur
October to March (pleasant desert climate). Winter (Nov–Feb) is peak season — book early.
